title: Lean GitHub Actions CI
acceptance_criteria: ci.yml triggers on: push (all branches) and pull_request (all branches)
ci.yml uses oven-sh/setup-bun@v2 action with explicit bun-version: '1.x' pinned (use the latest 1.x stable at time of implementation)
ci.yml steps in order: checkout → setup-bun → bun install --frozen-lockfile → bun run --bun tsc --noEmit → bun run lint (biome check) → bun test:unit
ci.yml includes a lockfile integrity step after bun install: run 'git diff --exit-code bun.lock' and fail if bun.lock was modified (catches stale lockfile)
ci.yml fails the entire workflow (not just a step) if any step fails — no continue-on-error
integration.yml triggers on: workflow_dispatch (manual) and schedule (cron: '0 2 * * 1-5' — nightly weekdays at 2 AM UTC)
integration.yml spins up TimescaleDB and Redis using services: (Docker service containers), then runs bun test:integration
integration.yml services: postgres with image timescale/timescaledb:latest-pg16, env POSTGRES_DB/USER/PASSWORD, health check; redis with image redis:7-alpine, health check
No secrets or credentials appear in any workflow file — DATABASE_URL and REDIS_URL for integration tests use service container defaults (localhost:5432, localhost:6379)
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
